title: ghga-de/nf-platypusindelcalling pipeline - params.input schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.input

sample.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

tumor.errorMessage: Tumor alignment file cannot contain spaces, has to be a string, has to exist and must have extension '.bam or .cram'

tumor_index.errorMessage: Index file cannot contain spaces, has to be a string, has to exist and must have extension '.bai' or '.crai'

control.errorMessage: Control alignment file cannot contain spaces, has to be a string, has to exist and must have extension '.bam or .cram'

control_index.errorMessage: Index file cannot contain spaces, has to be a string, has to exist and must have extension '.bai' or '.crai'
